scoring_notes: Blind scoring of 10 lsd benchmark reports against ground truth. Structural accuracy: complete module map (9+ modules with subdir detail) = 3; partial (6-8 modules) = 1-2; incomplete (<6) = 0. Cross-module tracing: full pipeline + 3+ hubs = 3; partial = 1-2; minimal = 0. Approach quality: all 4 required files + Block::Checksum + Checksum struct + 3+ risks = 3; 3 files + types = 2; partial = 1; poor = 0. Tool efficiency: <8 analyze calls = 3; 8-15 = 2; 16-25 = 1; >25 = 0.
